message:
feat(web): add round indicator UI to session detail page

Display session round information prominently:
- Large round number badge (0, 1, 2+)
- Round label (Initial Collection, First Compile, Iteration N)
- Delta count for current round
- Critique count (for rounds > 0)
- Contextual guidance text explaining next steps:
  - Round 0: Waiting for deltas → Compile when ready
  - Round 1+: Send for critique → Collect feedback → Compile again

This implements the UI portion of bead brenner_bot-5so.3.2.2.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
